records.name: Missing access control
records.description: A privileged function can be executed by an unauthorized actor.

source.note: Historical SWC label complemented by OWASP/CWE.

records.name: Reentrancy
records.description: External control flow can re-enter a function before state is finalized.

source.note: Historical SWC label complemented by OWASP/CWE.

records.name: Transaction-ordering dependent allowance update
records.description: A state update can be exploited by front-running or transaction ordering.

source.note: Historical SWC label complemented by OWASP/CWE.

records.name: Incorrect token accounting
records.description: Token balances, total supply, assets, or shares are updated inconsistently.
